header.title: Workflow Process Diagram — Future Processes vs. Current Processes
header.subtitle: Pre-selection | Selection (Internal) | Pre-deployment Documents & Monitoring| Post-deployment | Status Welfare | Invoicing.

hoshi_section.title: Selection & Deployment Pipeline
hoshi_section.tag: Platforms: Gsheets + Web Portal + ODOO 19 + n8n
hoshi_section.subtitle: Data Architecture | Unified Data | PDF OTIT/SSW Forms Autofill | Date-specific auto-setup alerts

stages.english: JO Line-up and Fill, Candidate Profiling & Line-up

cards.name: BX1.1 Applicant Website
cards.trigger: Applicant enters and fills up application form and basic photos
features: A1.1.1 Self-input basic information and photos
A1.1.2 Triggers scheduled physical/online interview with applicant
A1.1.3 Save per page
A1.1.4 Auto-assign 'Applicant No'
A1.1.5 On applicant submission — blocks pipeline advancement until 100% complete
A1.1.6 Auto-rejection of expired or invalid documents
A1.1.7 FUTURE: Google Vision AI OCR extraction (propose then confirm)

cards.name: A1.1 Input/Edit Application Form data
cards.trigger: Applicant submits an application form with documents
features: A1.1.1 Kizuna portal (Internal use only) - data entry input Applicant details
A1.1.2 Multi-user applicant profile access
A1.1.3 Visible data summary per applicant profile/per batch
A1.1.4 Visible data completeness summary per applicant profile/per batch
A1.1.5 Log notes (activity recording)
data_outputs: AO1.1.1 Applicants Summary with input dates and info fields

cards.name: A1.2 JO Fulfilment, Candidate Lineup, Schedule Interview
cards.trigger: Kumiai sends JO requests. Lineup (3x + 1 reserved) candidates based on profile requirements | Revise candidate lineup after Kumiai rejection | Revise candidate profile based on updated/wrong info | Edit JO request details; hotel stay; interview schedule
features: A1.2.1 Kizuna portal (Internal use only) - drag-and-drop applicant profiles
A1.2.2 Searchable Candidate data points, stages, manual candidate lineup inside each JO Card
A1.2.3 Expanded JO Card: includes Kumiai requests, trade test schedules, calendar, company trip and hotel stay and interview details
A1.2.4 Calendar Interview Schedule (Time/Blocking) & Smart Scheduling of auxiliary activities eg trade tests
A1.2.5 Auto-generate candidate profile pdf, trade test video links, click-email to Kumiai
A1.2.6 Drag-and-drop JO cards and profiles. Simple UI for updating
A1.2.7 Log notes (activity recording)
A1.2.8 Admin access - multi-period data, security, Kumiai and candidates management
A1.2.9 [FUTURE] Import data from Applicant website and Hoshi Recruit App
A1.2.10 Manual data entry of Candidate, JO, Interview Schedule data, status and stage

approval.label: Notifies Team regarding dates/times via email

data_outputs: AO1.2.1 JO Requests Summary with dates and info fields
AO1.2.4 Comments and activities history (log notes)

stages.english: Trade Tests & Assessment | Interview | Confirm Candidate

cards.name: A2.1 Trade Tests Media and Data Points Inputs
A2.2 Online Interview/Selection
cards.trigger: Kumiai requests for online interview/selection process
features: A2.2.1 Same as current online interview process

approval.label: Update candidate profile for 'Interview Type', complete profile data and trade test links
Verify candidate lineup, fulfil Kumiai requests, until selected

cards.name: A2.3 Physical Interview/Selection
cards.trigger: Kumiai requests for physical interview/selection process
features: A2.3.1 As is

approval.label: Update candidate profile for 'Interview Type', complete profile data and trade test links
Verify candidate lineup, fulfil Kumiai requests, until selected

cards.name: A2.4 Portal Selection
cards.trigger: Kumiai chooses candidate solely on Kizuna portal
features: A2.4.1 Password-protected portal page, link sent via email
A2.4.2 Multi-candidate profiles via side-by-side presentation

approval.label: Update candidate profile for 'Interview Type', complete profile data and trade test links
Verify candidate lineup, fulfil Kumiai requests, until selected

data_outputs: AO2.4.1 Portal - candidate profiles comparison page

cards.name: A3.1 Candidate Status Update
cards.trigger: Kumiai approves selected candidate - becomes trainee
features: A3.1.1 Triggers COE-related documentation deadlines
A3.1.2 Triggers other deadlines for pre-deployment
A3.1.3 [Manual] Conduct/Attendance + monthly scores to Odoo worker profile
A3.1.4 Batch grouping engine (cohort management)
A3.1.5 Auto-syncs Batch and Workers readiness statuses
A3.1.6 Field for encoding the Job Order (JO) ID assigned to each applicant
A3.1.7 Job Order (JO) Monitoring Summary Table for encoder verification and tracking
data_outputs: Jap Language score progression per trainee

cards.name: A3.2 Recruitment Agreement, Job Orders and Other MWO Requirements
cards.trigger: MWO Requirements, Kumiai Agreement, and Job Order Processing Prior to Trainee Deployment
features: A3.2.1 Recruitment Agreement expiry notification
A3.2.2 Job order expiry
A3.2.3 Job order monitoring (Transaction Logs, JO number, JO Balance)
data_outputs: Email monthly Trainee Completion Report to Kumiai
Early warning flags for delayed trainees

cards.name: A3.3 Generate Documents - Contract, Docs for COE
cards.trigger: On placement confirmation — auto-generates employment contract from System template
features: A3.3.1 Template engine — TITP / SSW1 / SSW2 contract variants
A3.3.2 Auto-populates worker, kumiai, wage, duration fields, and others
A3.3.3 PDF generation
A3.3.4 Version control — tracks all contract amendments
data_outputs: (Manual) Contract status tracker (from draft to signed to filed)
Ready contract archive in Odoo Docs

cards.name: A3.4 Receive COE - Generate Final Docs for EOC, visa, ticket
cards.trigger: On receipt of COE — auto-generates employment contract from Odoo template
features: A3.4.1 [Manual] Update EOC, Visa, Ticket statuses
A3.4.2 ?Auto-updates Kumiai?

cards.name: A4.1 Confirmation of Arrival, Placement, Worker Welfare and Status
cards.trigger: On worker arrival date in Japan — based on flight date & time, settle in until stable. Conduct weekly welfare scans based on scheduled post-deployment intervals (30/60/90 days) and random flagged cases.
features: A4.1.1 [Manual] Update worker's arrival status in Japan
A4.1.2 Triggers Invoicing draft in Accounting
A4.1.3 Sends update alert to respective staff (HR, Admin, Acctg)
A4.1.4 Version control — tracks changes
A4.1.5 Automate monthly welfare surveys via Email/LINE, with responses directly integrated into the Kiroku database.
A4.1.6 Analyze worker sentiment and allow welfare officers to manually encode welfare survey results, incidents, and case-specific observations.
A4.1.7 Trigger escalation procedures for negative welfare signals and generate weekly welfare and worker status summary reports.

cards.name: A4.2 Invoice Clients
cards.trigger: On confirmed arrival in Japan — auto-generates placement fee invoices | On monthly invoice dates - auto-generate invoice
features: A4.2.1 Fee calculation engine (per worker x rate x kumiai terms)
A4.2.2 Auto-invoice via Odoo Accounting module
A4.2.3 Receivables aging tracker with auto-reminders at 15/30/60 days
A4.2.4 Invoicing stops depending on worker status
A4.2.5 [Manual Input] Update/Revise invoice data such as dates, amounts
A4.2.6 Escalates issues/alerts to Manager, gives a Weekly Summary
data_outputs: Revenue Summary per kumiai / per trade / per month

cards.name: A4.3 Get Client Feedback on Worker Performance
cards.trigger: Annually or Bi-annual performance and attendance evaluation from Kumiai or client
features: A4.3.1 Fill up Evaluation Sheet in email and auto-fills Kiroku database
A4.3.2 Tiered alert grading (green, amber, red, critical
A4.3.3 Escalates issues/alerts to Manager, individually or by batch. Gives Weekly Summary
A4.3.4 Upon Mgr approval, Welfare Officer contacts worker for performance feedback

cards.name: A4.4 Document Expiry Alerts
cards.trigger: Weekly scans — flags documents expiring within 90/60/30/15 days
features: A4.4.1. KIROKU monitors all doc types: visa, passport, COE, insurance
A4.4.2. Tiered alert severity (green, amber, red, critical)
A4.4.3. Auto-emails to responsible parties with renewal instructions
A4.4.4. Escalates issues/alerts to Manager, individually or by batch. Gives Weekly Summary

cards.name: A4.5 TITP Renewal (Ichigo, Sanggou)
cards.trigger: Weekly Scans based on scheduled intervals (30/60/90 days post-deployment) + random flags
features: A4.5.1 Automated monthly welfare survey via email/LINE, delivered to Kiroku database
A4.5.2 Analyze worker sentiment from worker responses
A4.5.3 [Manual Input] Welfare officer fills up welfare survey and incidents on specific workers
A4.5.4 Triggers escalation on negative signals. Weekly Summary on welfare and worker status
data_outputs: Welfare report per worker / per Kumiai
Early warning flags/reports for at-risk workers

stages.english: Assess Personnel | Renew Contract | Next Country Postings

cards.name: A5.1 Recruitment/Pooling
cards.trigger: Contact end of contract workers to offer new job opportunities
features: A5.1.1 Renewal of requirements, notifies deadline
A5.1.2 Status update
A5.1.3 New track

cards.name: A5.2 Redeploy Person - SSW 1 and SSW 2
cards.trigger: TITP workers applying for SSW are automatically redirected to the requirements processing workflow, with status updates reflected in the system.
features: A5.2.1 Automatic renewal and monitoring of requirements with deadline notifications
A5.2.2 Real-time status update and tracking
A5.2.3 Creation of a dedicated SSW processing track
A5.2.4 Requirement completion monitoring
A5.2.5 Expiry and renewal alert system

cards.name: A5.3 Redeploy to Other Countries
features: A5.1.1 xxx
A5.1.2 xxx
A5.1.3 xxxx

cross_stage.name: Pipeline Stall Detection (DO NOT READ- ON HOLD)
cross_stage.description: Monitors all 5 stages for bottlenecks exceeding SLA thresholds
features: SLA timer per pipeline stage (configurable per kumiai)
Auto-escalation when candidate stalls at any gate beyond threshold days
Bottleneck visualization — identifies systemic slowdowns
data_outputs: Avg days per stage — actual vs. target
Deployment cycle time (target: 4 months from intake to arrival)
Stall frequency heatmap by stage and kumiai

manual_section.title: Current Processes (C)
manual_section.subtitle: Reactive, error-prone, zero autonomous monitoring — every action requires human initiation

pain_points: C1.1 Applicants walk-in the office. Submits Application forms and docs
C1.2 Front Desk Give Google Form and IQ Test. Check documents based on paper checklist
C1.3 Nurse Checks bio-measures.
C1.4 Applicant interview and Input Candidate Profiles in Porters.
C1.5 Assemble candidate list by manual sorting, from Porters. Email Candidate Profile to Kumiai
C2.1 Schedule candidates for trade tests. IT staff conduct and record trade tests. Edit media. Send media.
C2.2 Physical: Schedule the visit, hotel and vehicle service. Receive/Host the Kumiai and Company for selection trip
C2.3 Online: Schedule zoom call interview, inform candidates of schedule
C2.4 Update and consolidate Interview Calendar
C2.5 Upon selection, email Kumiai. Start language training and documents. Update Porters.
C3A.1 TRAINING PATH: Attend 9 modules. Record attendance sheets. Record weekly Japanese grades.
C3A.2 Email Kumiai with individual results monthly (4x per training period)
C3A.3 Prepare for JLPT N5 in the last month
C3A.4 Insert ESD-related language training requirements
C3B.1 DOCUMENTS PATH: Type and prepare OTIT Docs, MWO Docs, DMW Docs for COE
C3B.2 After COE, docs for EOC, visa, and air ticket
C4.1 Confirm arrival in Japan and entry to company
C4.2 Acctg staff make and send invoice clients
C4.3 Welfare Officer check worker welfare and status
C4.4 Monitoring and update status of Ichigo, Sanggou

footer: KOSEI Intelligence — Workflow Process Diagram v1.1 — Confidential
